fields.label: Source Name
fields.description: Identifier the dashboard HTML uses to request this source's rows (window.jarvis.data(name)). Letters, digits, _ and - only.

fields.label: Tool
fields.description: Which read tool serves this source at view time (always as the viewing user).

fields.label: Spec
fields.description: JSON spec for the tool: a structured query spec, {doctype, fields, filters, ...} for get_list, or {report_name, filters} for run_report.
